prompt: Show a data table with Name, Role, and Status columns and 3 rows of sample data.
reference:
import { Table } from '@tale-ui/react/table';

export function DataTable() {
  return (
    <Table.Root aria-label="Team members">
      <Table.Header>
        <Table.Column isRowHeader>Name</Table.Column>
        <Table.Column>Role</Table.Column>
        <Table.Column>Status</Table.Column>
      </Table.Header>
      <Table.Body>
        <Table.Row id="1">
          <Table.Cell>Alice Johnson</Table.Cell>
          <Table.Cell>Designer</Table.Cell>
          <Table.Cell>Active</Table.Cell>
        </Table.Row>
        <Table.Row id="2">
          <Table.Cell>Bob Smith</Table.Cell>
          <Table.Cell>Engineer</Table.Cell>
          <Table.Cell>Active</Table.Cell>
        </Table.Row>
        <Table.Row id="3">
          <Table.Cell>Carol White</Table.Cell>
          <Table.Cell>Manager</Table.Cell>
          <Table.Cell>Away</Table.Cell>
        </Table.Row>
      </Table.Body>
    </Table.Root>
  );
}
